changes: Elusive Jump now accurately states that enmity is halved.

The effect of the actions Ingenuity and Ingenuity II has been adjusted (slightly lowers recipe level for the next five steps for Ingenuity; lowers recipe level for the next five steps for Ingenuity II).
Resurrection now accurately states that it cannot be used in PvP.
Miasma and Miasma II now accurately state that Heavy is not applied in PvP.
Miasma and Miasma II now accurately state that Heavy is not applied in PvP.
Elusive Jump now accurately states that enmity is halved.
Resurrection now accurately states that it cannot be used in PvP.

new_content.name: Glamours
new_content.description: System allowing players to alter the appearance of gear to resemble other gear.

new_content.name: Retainer Ventures
new_content.description: System to assign retainers tasks to procure items.
new_content.location: Limsa Lominsa Lower Decks (X:9 Y:11), New Gridania (X:11 Y:12), Ul'dah - Steps of Nald (X:9 Y:8)

new_content.name: Challenge Log
new_content.description: System containing a list of adventuring objectives with weekly rewards.

new_content.name: Gardening
new_content.description: Feature allowing players to cultivate various plants on estate grounds.
new_content.location: Mist (X:10, Y:11), Lavender Beds (X:11, Y:8), The Goblet (X:11, Y:9)

new_content.name: Saga of the Zodiac Weapons
new_content.description: A series of quests to create mighty relic weapons.

new_content.name: Kobold and Sahagin Beast Tribe Quests
new_content.location: Outer La Noscea (X:21, Y:18) and Western La Noscea (X:17, Y:21)

new_content.name: Duty Roulette: Expert and Duty Roulette: Trials
new_content.description: New Duty Finder categories for increased rewards.

glamour.name: Grade 1 Glamour Prism
glamour.description: For projecting the appearance of equipment item level 1-20.

glamour.description: For projecting the appearance of equipment item level 21-40.

glamour.name: Grade 3 Glamour Prism
glamour.description: For projecting the appearance of equipment item level 41-60.

glamour.name: Grade 4 Glamour Prism
glamour.description: For projecting the appearance of equipment item level 61-80.

glamour.name: Grade 5 Glamour Prism
glamour.description: For projecting the appearance of equipment item level 81 or above.

glamour.name: Glamour Dispeller
glamour.description: This black prism absorbs the magical lights woven upon a glamoured piece of equipment, thus dispelling the optical illusion.
